substep.title: Detect Mode
substep.action: Check whether the question tool is available. Available → INTERACTIVE. Absent → AUTONOMOUS. Later substeps branch on this.

check.action:
Confirm repo and topic are both present. If either is missing, emit to stdout and stop:
ERROR: Missing required field '{repo|topic}'. The dispatching caller failed to supply complete dispatch context. No scout performed.
If repo is present but cannot be parsed into an org/repo (ambiguous shorthand, no resolvable URL), emit:
CLARIFICATION_NEEDED: Could not resolve '{repo}' to a clonable repository. Re-dispatch with a full URL or org/repo.
Confirm the repo (URL, org/repo, or clone command) and the study topic. Derive the canonical org/repo name; if ambiguous, ask via the question tool.

substep.title: Search the Catalog First
substep.action:
Before any clone, search the global catalog:
uv run {base_dir}/scripts/catalog.py search "{org/repo or topic}"
Read what matches per references/extern-catalog.md. - Prior research exists and covers this topic sufficiently: read the existing document and SKIP cloning — jump to step 5 to return it with reused=true. - Prior research exists but has gaps for this topic: note the gaps; proceed to study only the gap. - No prior research: proceed to clone.
